description: Address semantic review issues: create shared proxy utility with error handling/timeout, refactor all 54 routes to use it, add 8 missing routes, fix auth header issue, update package exports and next.config.
steps: Create packages/api-client/src/proxy.ts with proxyToBackend utility (error handling, timeout, auth header fix, content-type check)
Update packages/api-client/src/index.ts to export proxyToBackend and ProxyOptions
Update next.config in both apps to include @quant/api-client in transpilePackages
Refactor all 37 QuantSync route handlers to use proxyToBackend
Refactor all 17 QuantAds route handlers to use proxyToBackend
Add 3 missing QuantSync routes: feed/engagement, posts/repost, posts/quote
Add 6 missing QuantAds routes: ai/predict-performance, ai/recommend-budget, ai/creative-suggestions, billing/balance, placements, placements/specs
acceptance_criteria: Shared proxy utility exists with try/catch, timeout, content-type check, and conditional auth header
All 54+ route handlers use the shared utility
